title: corn bread
directions: Preheat oven to 425°F with the cast iron skillet inside.

directions.step: Whisk together corn meal, flour, sugar, salt, and baking powder in a medium bowl.
In a large bowl, whisk the egg, add the milk, and add the flour mixture. Stir until combined. Add melted butter and stir again.
Once preheated, add the remaining butter to the hot skillet.

directions: Once the butter has melted, add the batter to the pan and place in the oven.
Bake for 15-18 minutes or until a toothpick comes out with a few crumbs.
notes: Optionally: add chopped jalapeños or bacon to the batter before adding to the hot pan.
